data.name: Site_MetaDescription_Home
data.value: Roman Kovařík — experienced .NET developer. Specializing in ASP.NET Core, Angular, MVC, C# and integrating artificial intelligence into web applications.

data.name: Site_MetaDescription_Default
data.value: Roman Kovařík — .NET developer specializing in web applications, ASP.NET Core, Angular, MVC architecture and AI integration.

data.name: Site_Keywords
data.value: Roman Kovarik, .NET developer, C#, ASP.NET Core, Angular, AI integration, web developer, Czech Republic

data.name: Hero_Description
data.value: I specialize in building web applications on the .NET platform, MVC architecture, Angular SPAs and integrating artificial intelligence into modern solutions.

data.name: About_P1
data.value: I'm an experienced software developer focused on .NET technologies and modern web development. I have years of practice designing and implementing web applications — from internal corporate information systems to public-facing websites.

data.name: About_P2
data.value: Currently I'm intensively exploring the integration of AI tools into the development process, bridging classic enterprise development with the possibilities of large language models and services such as OpenAI, Anthropic and others.

data.name: About_P3
data.value: Beyond development I have experience leading small teams, doing code reviews, building CI/CD pipelines and designing application architecture.

data.name: Skills_Subtitle
data.value: Technologies and tools I work with daily and on long-running projects.

data.name: Exp_Subtitle
data.value: Overview of key positions and milestones from my career in software development.

data.name: Exp_Desc1
data.value: Development of enterprise web applications in .NET, architecture design, AI service integration, mentoring of junior developers.

data.name: Exp_Desc2
data.value: Experience with the complete data processing lifecycle. Visualization and interpretation of analytical results, building data reports and dashboards, web application development with ASP.NET MVC and Angular front-end, work with SQL Server and Entity Framework.

data.name: Exp_Desc3
data.value: Network administration, application administration, IT user support, maintenance of information systems.

data.name: Proj_Subtitle
data.value: A selection of projects I have worked on or that have enriched me technically.

data.name: Proj1_Desc
data.value: Personal portfolio website built on .NET 10 and Razor Pages with a modern dark-themed design.

data.name: Proj2_Desc
data.value: Enterprise information system with an Angular front-end and .NET Core back-end, authentication and advanced data management.

data.name: Proj3_Desc
data.value: Integration of large language models (LLMs) into enterprise applications using Azure OpenAI and Semantic Kernel.

data.name: Proj4_Desc
data.value: Smart AI assistant for evaluating and planning cycling training, including route planning on OpenStreetMap data.

data.name: Proj5_Desc
data.value: Android app for measuring the deviation of mechanical watches. You take a photo of the dial, the app records the precise time and uses the OpenClaw AI skill to read the seconds hand from the sub-dial — the result is the watch deviation in seconds.

data.name: Proj6_Desc
data.value: Windows tray application for speech-to-text transcription using Whisper. Recording via global hotkey, voice-to-text transcription with Vulkan acceleration and pasting at the cursor position. Supports WebSocket streaming and a chunked mode for live transcription.

data.name: Contact_Subtitle
data.value: Have a project I could collaborate on? Don't hesitate to reach out.

data.name: Privacy_MetaDescription
data.value: Privacy policy of kovarik.eu — information about how visitor data is handled.

data.name: Privacy_P1
data.value: This website does not collect or process any personal data of its visitors. No tracking cookies, third-party analytics tools or advertising systems are used.

data.name: Privacy_P2
data.value: If you contact me by e-mail, your details will be used solely to reply to your message and will not be shared with any third party.
